testcase.name: test_list_surveys
testcase.failure:
self = <test_persistence.TestSurveyCrud object at 0x000001C44EE43E50> manager = <persistence.PersistenceManager object at 0x000001C44EE65A50>
def test_list_surveys(self, manager): s1 = Survey(university="U1", faculty="F1", department="D1", subject="Math", professor="P1", semester="1", academic_year="2024") s2 = Survey(university="U1", faculty="F1", department="D1", subject="Physics", professor="P2", semester="2", academic_year="2024") manager.create_survey(s1) manager.create_survey(s2) results = manager.list_surveys() assert len(results) == 2 # Default order is updated_at DESC, so s2 should appear first > assert results[0].subject == "Physics" E AssertionError: assert 'Math' == 'Physics' E E #x1B[0m#x1B[91m- Physics#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E #x1B[92m+ Math#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m
tests\test_persistence.py:82: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_survey_cascading_delete
testcase.failure:
self = <test_persistence.TestSurveyCrud object at 0x000001C44EE5DB50> manager = <persistence.PersistenceManager object at 0x000001C44F7223D0>
def test_survey_cascading_delete(self, manager): survey = Survey(university="U1", faculty="F1", department="D1", subject="S1", professor="P1", semester="1", academic_year="2024") created = manager.create_survey(survey) result = FormResult( survey_id=created.id, form_id="form_001", image_path="/tmp/test.jpg", q1="Yes", q2="No", form_score=50.0, valid=True, confidence=0.95, ) manager.create_form_result(result) manager.delete_survey(created.id) > assert manager.get_form_results(created.id) == [] E AssertionError: assert [FormResult(s...=False, id=1)] == [] E E Left contains one more item: #x1B[0mFormResult(survey_id=#x1B[94m1#x1B[39;49;00m, form_id=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33mform_001#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, image_path=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m/tmp/test.jpg#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q1=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33mYes#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q2=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33mNo#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q3=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q4=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q5=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q6=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m,..., q10=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q11=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m, q12=#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m'#x1B[39;... E E ...Full output truncated (30 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show
tests\test_persistence.py:129: AssertionError

C:\Users\nasir\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Lib\pathlib.py:1147: PermissionError

testcase.name: test_complex_json_value

error.message: failed on teardown with "PermissionError: [WinError 32] The process cannot access the file because it is being used by another process: 'C:\\Users\\nasir\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\tmpe30rr0bi.db'"
